The '''Cleansing of Yavin 4''' was one of the first skirmishes of the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]]. In it, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by [[Guun Han Saresh]], [[Shaela Nuur]], and [[Duron Qel-Droma]] cleansed the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] of [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]] left there by the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War's]] [[Krath Holy Crusade]].

==Appearances==
